scores.correctness_notes: Fully matches gold standard: correct YAML structure, all three protocol types with correct location formats, auto-label behavior per protocol, and field explanations for override/type/location/services/labels including env var substitution.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — the charm integration example is a reasonable addition not in the gold standard but is not fabricated; all API details match. The `-` prefix for excluding services is an extra detail not in gold standard but is not incorrect.
